title: triticum distans
intro: Triticum distans, also known as wild rye or shattering wheat, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the wheat family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Triticum distans include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Triticum distans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
